CustomField.formula: CASE(Status__c, "Cancellation Requested", IMAGE("/img/samples/flag_red.gif", "Red Flag"), "Retention In Progress", IMAGE("/img/samples/flag_yellow.gif", "Yellow Flag"), "Cancellation Initiated", IMAGE("/img/samples/flag_red.gif", "Red Flag"), "Booking Cancelled – Refund Pending", IMAGE("/img/samples/flag_red.gif", "Red Flag"), "Transfer In Progress", IMAGE("/img/samples/flag_red.gif", "Red Flag"), "Upgrade In Progress", IMAGE("/img/samples/flag_red.gif", "Red Flag"), "Transfer Completed", IMAGE("/img/samples/flag_red.gif", "Red Flag"), "Upgrade/Downgrade Completed", IMAGE("/img/samples/flag_green.gif", "Green Flag"), /* This is the default flag for any other status */ IMAGE("/img/samples/flag_green.gif", "Active Booking") )
CustomField.label: Status Flag
